scripts.deploy:web: cd flutter && flutter build web --release --dart-define=FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY=$FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting:personal --project homehd-personal
scripts.deploy:web:community: cd flutter && flutter build web --release --dart-define=FLAVOR=community --output=build/community_web && cd .. && firebase deploy --only hosting:community --project homehd-personal
scripts.build:apk: cd flutter && flutter build apk --release && cp build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk ../homehd-personal.apk
scripts.build:apk:community: cd flutter && flutter build apk --release --dart-define=FLAVOR=community && cp build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/app-release.apk ../homehd-community.apk
scripts.deploy:api: cd api && gcloud run deploy homehd-api --source . --region=europe-west2 --allow-unauthenticated --project=homehd-personal
